name: HR administrators in medical clinics managing 5-15 staff training renewals/month tool
description: For HR administrators in medical clinics processing 5-15 training renewals/month, manual tracking causes missed deadlines. We automate scheduling and confirmations instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or email.

problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and confirming training renewals for staff
